findings.issue: No wiring gaps. Path fully connected and correctly typed.
Two sequential guard re-elaboration blocks (lines 1562 and 1799) — both fire when a guard-controlling param changes. Redundant but currently produces correct results.
eval() resolves per-template; edit_param/resolve_concurrent_edit collect auto params across ALL templates into a single solver call. HashMap iteration determines scope_name (wrong objective).
Calling engine.check(module) after activate_purpose calls eval() which clears active_purposes. No warning in API.
activate_purpose not wired to MCP or CLI — no production callsite outside tests
findings.evidence: not found in reify-mcp or reify-cli

findings.issue: If auto params live in guarded groups, the second guard phase (lines 1799-1881) can overwrite solver-resolved values with Undef when the guard is false. Solver runs between the two phases.
cmd_build exits SUCCESS when geometry produced, even if constraints violated. CI cannot detect violated constraints.
scope_name set by HashMap iteration order — wrong entity picked non-deterministically in multi-template modules. Wrong optimization objective applied.
Params with default_expr: None (possible from grammar) silently skipped in eval() first pass — not inserted into values map or snapshot.
byte_offset_to_line_col column computation may be 0-based instead of claimed 1-based when offset lands at position i
tessellate_snapshot called unconditionally on every state update — blocks Tauri command thread on every parameter change
Early-exit feasibility check skipped when objective present — optimizer runs full 5000 iterations even if already feasible
1e-12 epsilon in comparison_violation makes cost nonzero at exact Ge/Le boundary — pushes solver away from boundary solutions
EvalState.engine replaced on every didChange — persistent state unused, incremental eval never benefits LSP
findings.reference: Briefing known_gaps: LSP creates new Engine on every didChange; tasks 479-480

findings.issue: Evaluation continues after parse errors, producing misleading secondary diagnostics
debug_assert for unit_table ordering vanishes in release builds — incorrect table ordering would silently parse wrong units
ChatMessage and SessionStatus defined in both gui/src/types.ts and gui/src/stores/claudeStore.ts with divergent shapes. types.ts versions are dead.
bridge.ts::lspRequest sends un-stringified params (typed as unknown). Dead code but dangerous if activated.
reify-eval/Cargo.toml duplicates reify-syntax and reify-compiler in both [dependencies] and [dev-dependencies]
reify-runtime test-utils feature never enabled externally — integration tests behind it are never run in normal cargo test
